headline: A Look At Diamondback Energy (FANG) Valuation After Recent Share Pullback And Ongoing Price Momentum
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Diamondback Energy (FANG) has drawn attention after a recent pullback of about 1.7% in the latest session, while the stock has recorded gains over the past week, month, past 3 months and year to date. At a last close of US$204.33, the company carries a market value of about US$58.4b, with reported annual revenue of US$14,459.0m and net income of US$279.0m from its Permian Basin focused oil and gas operations. See our latest analysis for...
